response.justification: Bogdan possesses a strong background in geospatial data platforms and high-throughput distributed systems, aligning well with the domain requirements of the role. While his recent experience lacks the explicitly required modern C++ or Rust, his proficiency in DLang and systems-level programming suggests he could quickly bridge this technical gap.
strengths: Deep domain expertise in geospatial data and GIS platforms.
Experience building low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, and open-source contributions.
concerns: No recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust.
Lacks direct experience with routing pipelines or navigation guidance algorithms.
Heavy recent focus on full-stack web technologies rather than backend data pipelines.
